title: Exclusive Item
description: Adds a tag that binds the weapon to the player rendering Player Exclusive!
body: *** # 🛡️ ExclusiveItem Mod This mod adds a new tag called `ExclusiveItem`, this is mostly used for Modpacks which add items to quests and they want it to be exclusive to that player only. The item is bounded to that player upon first pickup. ## 📜 Commands * To add the tag use: ``` /exclusiveitem add ``` * To add the tag requirement the player needs to use the item: ``` /exclusiveitem settag {tag} true/false ``` * To get an item not owned by you: ``` /exclusiveitem givefake modid:itemid ``` * To bypass the exclusive item detection use: ``` /exclusiveitem dev ``` * To remove the tag use: ``` /exclusiveitem remove ``` * To see all information of the exclusive item: ``` /exclusiveitem info ``` * To set bind on use: ``` /exclusiveitem set_on_use_bind ``` * To overwrite owners: ``` /exclusiveitem overrideowner ``` * To exclusive all items in inventory: ``` /exclusiveitem addall ``` ## 🔒 Currently Restricts (Latest version) * Weapon uses (swords…) * Ranged weapon (bows, tridents…) * Block use (cobblestone…) * Entity Interaction (Item frames, villagers…) * Item use (potions, shields) * Trinkets (Trinkets) * Spells from being used on Weapons (Spell Engine) * Exclusive Items can now check for player tags (optional), need to both have the Owner & Tag for the item to be usable # Here are some visuals: # Version 1.1.0+: - Adds a Claim bounded items screen (can be disabled through config) - Set a requirement like items and/or xp (can be customized through config) ***
